MakeMaterialAttributes.note: Verified by UE reflection commandlet. Also the auto-collect target: graphToUET3D synthesizes one MakeMaterialAttributes per MaterialOutput and reroutes the root's attribute wires into it, so a pasted material needs a single MaterialAttributes wire (enable Use Material Attributes). See collectMaterialOutputs in viewer/web/src/export/ueT3D.ts.
